name: nat-vent-evening-activation
description: Evening cool-down: outdoor 70F < indoor 76F — nat vent activates for free cooling

verdict.summary: When outdoor is cooler than indoor and below threshold, nat vent activates

verdict.expected_behavior: natural_ventilation with outdoor < indoor and outdoor < threshold

assertions.reason: outdoor 70F < indoor 76F (beneficial direction); outdoor 70F < threshold 75F; indoor 76F > comfort_heat 70F — nat vent activates
